message:
feat(vdbe,harness): LIKE/BETWEEN/IN/FunctionCall emit_expr, fix SorterCursor DESC, SOUNDEX NULL

- Add emit_expr arms for Expr::Like, Expr::Between, Expr::In (list),
  and Expr::FunctionCall (non-aggregate scalar functions)
- Fix SorterCursor::sort() to use compare_sorter_rows with DESC support
- Fix SOUNDEX(NULL) to return "?000" per SQLite spec (was returning NULL)
- Enable bd_2832_sql_pattern_coverage.rs tests: 33 pass, 3 ignored
  (GROUP BY, DISTINCT, multi-row INSERT need separate implementation)
- Replace assert!(false, ...) with panic!() for clippy compliance
- Mark dead code resolve_result_column_indices with #[allow(dead_code)]

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
